message:
test(fcp-host): expand 3 lowest-coverage modules via parallel subagents

redaction.rs: 26 → 107 (+81 tests) — Redacted<T> wrapper ops, RedactionPolicy
pattern matching, redact_json edge cases with nested objects/arrays.

health.rs: 77 → 158 (+81 tests) — HealthState merge exhaustive combos,
ResourceHealth threshold boundaries, HealthAggregator mixed states.

output_capture.rs: 59 → 139 (+80 tests) — RingBuffer overflow/wrap-around,
OutputCapture JSON parsing, InstallStatus/Result/Step types.

supervisor.rs: fix 3 pre-existing unchecked_time_subtraction clippy errors.

fcp-host total: 2233 pass, 0 fail, lib clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
